name: uderia-files
description: Filesystem access. Provides read_file, write_file, list_dir, and search_files tools. Admin configures an allowed path list.

tool_schemas.name: read_file
tool_schemas.description: Read the text content of a file from the allowed filesystem path.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Absolute path to the file to read.

tool_schemas.name: write_file
tool_schemas.description: Write text content to a file in the allowed filesystem path. Creates parent directories if needed.

tool_schemas.name: list_dir
tool_schemas.description: List the contents of a directory, returning names, types, and sizes.

arguments.name: show_hidden
arguments.description: Include hidden files and directories (default: false).

tool_schemas.name: search_files
tool_schemas.description: Search for files matching a glob pattern under a directory.

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: Glob or filename pattern to match (e.g. *.csv).

ALLOWED_PATHS.label: Allowed base paths
ALLOWED_PATHS.description: Comma-separated list of absolute directory paths the agent is permitted to access. E.g. /data/reports,/tmp/agent

MAX_FILE_SIZE_KB.label: Max file size (KB)
MAX_FILE_SIZE_KB.description: Maximum file size in KB for read/write operations.
